mean_en: to get away from a place where you have been kept as a prisoner or not allowed to leave; to get away from an unpleasant or dangerous situation; to avoid something unpleasant or dangerous;
sentence: He brakes hard to escape the rocks.
sentence_trans: 他猛踩刹车避开了石头。
word_etyma: es向外 + cape帽子，斗篷 → 从斗篷里钻出来 → escape逃跑，逃脱
